zh.lifeSummary: Alice Lovel於1200年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡素 加里。她於大約1210年與Richard Lovel Lord of Cary在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年9月5日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Lovel was born in 1200, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. She married Richard Lovel Lord of Cary about 1210, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 5 September 1263, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Lovel est née en 1200, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Richard Lovel Lord of Cary environ 1210, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 septembre 1263, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Lovel è nata il nel 1200 nel Castle Cary, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Richard Lovel Lord of Cary circa 1210, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 5 settembre 1263, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Lovelは1200年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで生まれた。約1210年にイギリスでRichard Lovel Lord of Caryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年9月5日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Lovel(은)는 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1210년 영국에서 Richard Lovel Lord of Cary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 9월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Lovel родилась в 1200 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Lovel Lord of Cary около 1210 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 сентября 1263 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.
